sent_simp: 卡车加载完货物后立刻出发。
sent_trad: 卡車加載完貨物後立刻出發。
pinyin: Kǎchē jiāzài wán huòwù hòu lìkè chūfā.
english: The truck set off immediately after finishing loading the cargo.

sent_simp: 他认为复古不是进步，社会应该向前看。
sent_trad: 他認為復古不是進步，社會應該向前看。
pinyin: Tā rènwéi fùgǔ bù shì jìnbù, shèhuì yīnggāi xiàng qián kàn.
english: He believes that turning back to old ways is not progress — society should look forward.

sent_simp: 初一早上全家一起去庙里拜年。
sent_trad: 初一早上全家一起去廟裡拜年。
pinyin: Chūyī zǎoshang quánjiā yīqǐ qù miào lǐ bàinián.
english: On the first day of the lunar new year, the whole family went to the temple together to pay their New Year respects.
